claims.summary: Minime combines the stable-core controller with density, viscosity, plurality, comfort, and pressure evidence rather than reducing state to fill alone.
claims.disposition: verify the typed regulator components and current tests in minime/src/regulator/core

claims.summary: A nominal comfort gate can coexist with mode packing or latent pressure and must not erase those channels.
claims.disposition: verify pressure, mode-packing, porosity, and comfort remain separately projected and reviewed

claims.summary: Pressure/porosity and band-stop sensitivity should be compared before any controller proposal is promoted.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline regulator replay comparing current pressure/porosity and tail-band sensitivity with no live write

claims.summary: Viscosity could modulate the PI path rather than remain advisory.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work because it changes live controller behavior and requires canary, abort, rescue, and felt-response evidence

claims.summary: A Shadow dispersal buffer could preserve tail complexity under pressure.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work because it changes live regulation and Shadow influence
